nasb.text: “After I had given the deed of purchase to Baruch the son of Neriah, then I prayed to the Lord, saying,

esv.text: “After I had given the deed of purchase to Baruch the son of Neriah, I prayed to the Lord, saying:

cnv.text: “我把買賣契約交給尼利亞的兒子巴錄以後，就向耶和華禱告，說：

ccb.text: 我把地契交给尼利亚的儿子巴录之后，便向耶和华祷告说：
